temporal_split.method: chronological; newest 15% test; 15% of remainder validation

bertimbau.note: Exact row-level embeddings are not redistributed in the ID-only public release; the immutable model revision and generation code are provided.

llm_annotation.note: Polarity and marker outputs are supplied. Free-text rationales are excluded because they may quote post content. Regeneration can differ because the original run was stochastic and provider behavior can change.
